title: Financial Analyst
description: Johnson & Johnson is seeking a Financial Analyst for our Provo facility to support business planning and financial analysis. Work hybrid while building financial expertise at one of the world's most trusted healthcare companies.
responsibilities: Analyze financial data and prepare variance reports and forecasts
Support budgeting and financial planning processes
Build and maintain financial models for scenario analysis
Prepare executive presentations and financial summaries
Monitor key performance indicators and financial metrics
Assist with cost analysis and process improvement initiatives

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, or related field
skills: Attention to detail and analytical thinking
certifications: CFA Level I or equivalent preferred

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
